blocks.text: Carlsen Chases Title as Europe's Champions League Drama Begins

Monday delivers chess royalty and European football's biggest stage. Magnus Carlsen enters Round 8 of the Grenke Freestyle Open in title contention — while Tuesday's Champions League quarterfinals loom on the horizon.
♟️ Carlsen plays Round 8, Grenke Freestyle Open A — title race sharpens at 10:15
⚽ Villarreal at Girona — La Liga Europa League places on the line at 21:00
Eyes already drift to Tuesday: Bayern vs. Real Madrid at the Bernabéu and Arsenal's away test in Lisbon — the quarterfinal first legs that will define European nights all month.
